approvalStep.description: Routes to the per-record Deal Desk approver; Finance Reviewers group receives the email alert.
approvalStep.label: Finance Margin Approval
approvalStep.name: Finance_Margin_Approval

ApprovalProcess.description: Finance approval for Quotes whose implementation-services line is below the margin floor. Enters on the independent Finance_Approval_Status__c dimension (QuoteTriggerHandler stamps Pending from DealDeskService.requiresFinanceReview), so blended-discount-only quotes are NOT misrouted here. Entry allows re-submission of a Rejected quote that is still below floor; once the services pricing is corrected the trigger clears the dimension. Final approval stamps it Approved so the Finance_Review_Below_Floor_Services validation rule passes — without satisfying the legal or discount gates.
ApprovalProcess.label: Northstar Services Margin Approval
